summary: OWASP Security Remediation Testing Complete - 34/34 tests passed. Tested CSV export formula injection sanitization, CORS configuration, auth enforcement, login flow, and IP anomaly detection regression. Found and fixed one bug in get_current_user_optional function.

tests: sanitize_csv_field prefixes carriage return with single-quote
sanitize_csv_row applies sanitization to all fields
Returns 200 with CSV content for admin
Returns 200 with CSV content for admin
CSV has proper structure (title, date, location columns)
Returns 403 without auth or signed URL
Returns 200 with CSV content for super admin
CSV contains Annual Disclosure Report structure

notes: server.py explicitly rejects wildcard '*' in CORS_ORIGINS
allow_credentials=True ensures browsers enforce specific origins
K8s ingress may add its own CORS headers externally (expected)

tests: Security settings readable by tenant admin
Security settings write forbidden for tenant admin (super admin only)
Alert stats structure correct (total, unresolved, last_24h, last_7d, by_severity, by_type)

bug_fixed.issue: Function did not check super_admins collection, causing super admins to fail authentication on endpoints using this dependency
bug_fixed.fix: Added same multi-tenant lookup logic as get_current_user (check tenant DB, then master_db.super_admins, then fallback db.users)

context_for_next_testing_agent: OWASP security features tested: CSV sanitization (A03), CORS (A05), auth enforcement. Bug fixed in get_current_user_optional. All CSV exports use sanitize_csv_row from utils/csv_security.py which prefixes dangerous chars (=,+,-,@,tab,cr,lf) with single-quote. IP anomaly detection from iteration_26 still working.
